title: is_subscribed cached at connect time — Phase 3 billing correctness
description: ws.rs caches subscription status at auth time: 'let is_subscribed = subscription_expires.is_some()'. The flag is never refreshed during a session. Scenario 1: client pays for subscription while connected — payment is recognized but they still see subscription_required errors until they reconnect. Scenario 2: subscription expires mid-session — client continues sending messages for the rest of the session (hours). A comment says 'Re-evaluated only on reconnect, which is fine for Phase 1' but this is not fine for Phase 3 billing accuracy. This should be resolved before subscription gating is enabled — the current design will generate a class of 'I paid but still can't send' reports.
